message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant "CShareMoreDlg" as A
participant "CSharingMoreWrapper" as B
participant "CPfwMainFrame" as C
participant "CPfwChainMessageMapT" as D
participant "CMCUIMgr" as E
participant "CSmDefUIMgr" as F
participant "CPfwMessageCenterAgent" as G
participant "CSmFITUIMgr" as H
participant "CMCFITUIMgr" as I
participant "CSmAppShareSessionMgr" as J
participant "CPcmAppShareMgr" as K

[-> A : OnBtnShareOtherApp
note over A : User Click "Other Application"
A -> B : ShareOtherApp
B -> C : SendMessage
note over C : PFW_QS_MENU_SHARE_OTHER_APP_ID
C -> D : PfwChainProcessWindowMessage
D -> C : ProcessWindowMessage
C -> E : OnWindowMsg
E -> F : OnWindowMsg
F -> F : ChainToMsgCenter
F -> G : SendMessage
G -> H : :ProcessWindowMessage
H -> I : OnCommand
I -> H : OnCommand
H -> J : SelectANewApplication
J -> K : ShowInstalledAppDialog

@enduml
```
